@startuml title Traffic influencing flows between OpenNESS controller and 5G Core skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center skinparam participantStyle rectangle skinparam note { BackgroundColor LightYellow } skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid actor "User/Admin" as UserAdmin1 at leftmost participant "OpenNESS Controller components" as ONC_Comp_Container <> #LightBlue [0] rectangle UI_CLI within ONC_Comp_Container [[UI/CLI]] rectangle AF_Microservice within ONC_Comp_Container [[AF Microservice]] note right of NEF : NEF\nNetwork Exposure Function \nThe Network \nexposure function provides means to expose capabilities\nto third party applications. box "#9ACD32"5G Core Components#Black [/]<#white>[/] participant NGCP_Functions<>[[NGC CP Functions]][[Next Generation Control Plane functions ]]as NGCFunc end box == Get all subscribed traffic influence info == activate UserAdmin1 UserAdmin1 -> UI_CLI++: Request all traffic influence subscribed deactivate UserAdmin1 UI_CLI->AF_Microservice ++:/af/v1/subscriptions : GET AF_Microservice -->ONC_Comp_Container /3gpp-traffic-Influence/v1/{aflId}/subscriptions :GET on call overline group{On Call OverLine}{ autonumber "[0]" "." "" hide footbox ONC_Comp_Container-->NGCFunc:{Open: 3rd party NGC integration with OpenNESS(NEF)} deactivate ONC_Comp_Container note on link #lightgreen:{Open: 3rd party NGC
integration with
OpenNESS(NEF)} end group on return underline group{return under line }{ hide footbox return OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500} UI_CLI<-return--OK: traffic influence info ERROR: {400/500} UserAdmin1 <- -Traffic influence details end group ==Get subscribed traffic influence info by subscriptionID== activate UserAdmin1 useradmin1->ui_cli:request traffic influence using Subscriptionid ui_cli-> af_microservice:/af/v1/Subscriptions/(Subscriptionld):get af_mircoservice -- >onc_comp_container/:3gpp_traffic_influencelvl(aft)/subscription(subscription id) get onc-comp-container --->ngc_func:(open:third-party ngc intergration openness(nef)) deactivate ong_copm_containerr autnumber"[O].""Hide FootBox Group(on-call-over-line){ autonumer"(0)"."HIDE FOOTBOX Onc-camp-containeer---->Ngc-funcl(open-third-pary-ngc-integration-openess-nef) Deactive-onc-compt-conainer-note-right-of-link-light-green(i)(open-thirparty-nge-interaction-with-bold-opennesseef)i-end-group-return-underlined-hiden-foot-box-retur-ok-trafic-infuence-info-error-(four-zero-slash-five-zeros)-ui-cli-left-arrow-dashdash-o-k-t-r-a-i-e-l-u-e-n-c-e i n f o e r r or four zero slash five zeros-user-admin-one dash minus t raic inf lu en ce det ail s de act iv ate us er ad min one footer ProprietaryandConfidential header IntelCorporat ion@end um l
